name: torrescpa.com
message: When talking about Torres CPA Group we have to mention the fact the company dates back to 1981 when founder, CPA William Torres Torres, began his own practice. This occurred after several years of working with one of the leading international CPA firms. The Torres CPA Group, now known as TCG, is one of the industry- leading local CPA firms with national and international affiliations. Helping organizations to perform in today’s challenging financial landscape, solutions, at a reasonable cost, and with the required expertise you deserve, all to keep growing together. Learn more about Torres CPA Group Below.SITE: www.torrescpa.com Address : PO Box 4846, Carolina, Puerto Rico, 00984, United States
